zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Bernehaud於大約1365年出生在英國斯塔福爾可利時，她的父親Richard Bernehaud21歲，母親Isabella de Bretton20歲。她於大約1380年與Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年之後在英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Bernehaud于大约1365年出生在英国斯塔福爾可利时，她的父亲Richard Bernehaud21岁，母亲Isabella de Bretton20岁。她于大约1380年与Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年之后在英国英格兰德比夏爾梅爾布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Bernehaud was born about 1365, in Checkley, Staffordshire, England, her father, Richard Bernehaud, was 21 and her mother, Isabella de Bretton, was 20. She married Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire about 1380, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1439, in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Bernehaud est née environ 1365, à Checkley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bernehaud, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Bretton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire environ 1380, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1439, à Melbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Bernehaud um 1365 in Checkley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Bernehaud 21 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Bretton 20. Sie hat um 1380 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1439 in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Bernehaud è nata il circa 1365 nel Checkley, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Bernehaud, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Bretton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire circa 1380, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1439, nel Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bernehaudが約1365年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェックリーで生まれた時，父Richard Bernehaudは21歳，母Isabella de Brettonは20歳であった。約1380年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでRobert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年以後にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルボウルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Bernehaud(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Bernehaud(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Bretton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 멜보우른에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Bernehaud nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bernehaud, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Bretton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire aproximadamente 1380, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1439, em Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Bernehaud родилась около 1365 г. в местности чеккли, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Bernehaud было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Bretton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire около 1380 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1439 г. в местности мелбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert Fraunceys Sheriff of Nottinghamshire aproximadamente 1380, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1439, en Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
